욥기 35:2.content: “Do you think this to be your right, or do you say, ‘My righteousness is more than God’s,’

욥기 35:3.content: that you ask, ‘What advantage will it be to you? What profit will I have, more than if I had sinned?’

욥기 35:4.content: I will answer you, and your companions with you.

욥기 35:5.content: Look to the skies, and see. See the skies, which are higher than you.

욥기 35:6.content: If you have sinned, what effect do you have against him? If your transgressions are multiplied, what do you do to him?

욥기 35:7.content: If you are righteous, what do you give him? Or what does he receive from your hand?

욥기 35:8.content: Your wickedness may hurt a man as you are, and your righteousness may profit a son of man.

욥기 35:9.content: “By reason of the multitude of oppressions they cry out. They cry for help by reason of the arm of the mighty.

욥기 35:10.content: But no one says, ‘Where is God my Maker, who gives songs in the night,

욥기 35:11.content: who teaches us more than the animals of the earth, and makes us wiser than the birds of the sky?’

욥기 35:12.content: There they cry, but no one answers, because of the pride of evil men.

욥기 35:13.content: Surely God will not hear an empty cry, neither will the Almighty regard it.

욥기 35:14.content: How much less when you say you don’t see him. The cause is before him, and you wait for him!

욥기 35:15.content: But now, because he has not visited in his anger, neither does he greatly regard arrogance.

욥기 35:16.content: Therefore Job opens his mouth with empty talk, and he multiplies words without knowledge.”
